name: Kansas
address: Memorial Hall, 1st Floor, 120 S.W. 10th Avenue, Topeka, KS 66612-1594

llc.formName: Certificate of Cancellation - Domestic (Kansas) Limited Liability Company
steps: Vote to dissolve the LLC per your operating agreement
Ensure entity is in good standing with Kansas Secretary of State
Wind up business affairs and settle all debts and obligations
File final tax returns with Kansas Department of Revenue
File online ($35) or by paper ($35) with the Secretary of State
Notify creditors and claimants of dissolution
Cancel any licenses, permits, and trade names
llc.notes: Business must be in good standing to file. If delinquent, you must file an information report first. If forfeited, you must reinstate before closing. Fee is $35 for paper filing; online filing is $35.

steps: Obtain board of directors resolution authorizing dissolution
Ensure entity is in good standing with Kansas Secretary of State
Wind up business affairs and settle all obligations
File final tax returns with Kansas Department of Revenue
File online ($35) or by paper ($35) with the Secretary of State
Notify creditors and claimants of dissolution
Cancel any licenses, permits, and trade names
corporation.notes: This form is for corporations that have commenced business. For corporations prior to commencing business, use Form CP (Certificate of Dissolution Prior to Commencing Business).

tax.notes: File final Kansas income tax return and any final sales tax returns. Must settle all tax obligations. Contact the Department of Revenue to close tax accounts and obtain clearance.

requirements.employeeNotification: Provide WARN Act notice if applicable (60 days for 100+ employees)
requirements.creditorNotification: Must notify known creditors in writing with deadline for submitting claims
requirements.registeredAgentNotes: Entity must be in good standing and current on all filings before dissolution can be accepted
requirements.windingUpPeriod: Entity continues to exist for purpose of winding up after filing dissolution
requirements.boardOrMemberApproval: LLC: Majority vote of members or per operating agreement. Corporation: Board resolution followed by shareholder approval.

includes: Every required form with direct download links
